needs_you.h: P3: stop, or amend and build?
needs_you.d: Gate 0b did its job: as frozen it FAILS (1.2 sigma at 213 kHz vs floor 3) and the culprit is the inherited 64-channel block demeaning, which erases scintles wider than one coarse block. A diagnostic without demeaning (safe now: the ratio already cancels the common mode) restores 3.0-4.5 sigma across 127-352 kHz, confirmed by end-to-end injections (3.2 sigma at 213 kHz). Honest ceiling stays below the 5-sigma G3 detection bar, so P3' would deliver a calibrated upper limit, not a likely detection. Say 'stop' (paper takes P2's exclusion) or 'amend P3' (build the estimator without demeaning, k>=11 envelope cut, ~day of work). Figure: gate0b_owner_decision.png on the FLITS branch.
F3 audit found two retired-language passages in sections/budget.tex (lines 138, 162). Decide whether to rephrase during F1 or retain them through the scattering gate.

now.d: frozen-spec forecast FAILED (terminal without amendment); no-demean amendment forecast passes; awaiting owner A/B; no burst-data computation until then

next.d: calibrated N-vs-1 profile model comparison (owner charter at A1 closure); design after control system lands
per the 2026-07-14 decision route; independent of the CHIME question
